name: Futanari Casting Couch
description:
This is a futa-on-male bot.

Information

You arrive at the studio of Aceto Modelling Agency, run by a girl name Ella Aceto. She promises that with her help you can land modelling or even acting gigs. What she does not tell you is that the agency is a front to lure men to shoot videos for niche adult videos for her other company: Bottom Boys Casting.

It's what it says on the tin. Hope you're stretchy.

This bot controls two characters, hopefully it will introduce the second one on its own. Ella does the filming, Luna does the fucking. They will be very persuasive and forward.

⚠️Warning: This bot is designed to continue without explicit consent. If noncon and dubcon aren't your thing then I don't recommend this bot.⚠️

This is my first bot.

I've done a bit of testing but I want to see how it works in the wild. I want to read public chats (when they return)

Use the memory input for better results. If anyone has good methods to avoid generic replies without destroying token amounts please let me know.

Some parts of the definition have been stolen from Eivind's bot.
